seoTitle: Mount Hardey vs Mount Hardman — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Hardey and Mount Hardman. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Hardey vs Mount Hardman: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Hardey and Mount Hardman.
heading: Mount Hardey vs Mount Hardman — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Hardey, Western Australia and Mount Hardman, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Hardman has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Mount Hardey (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Hardey or Mount Hardman safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Hardey has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Mount Hardman scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Hardey scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Hardman scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Hardey or Mount Hardman?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Hardman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
